assumptions: Auditing the Events Strategy PDF only (Business Pipelines PDF not in this directory).
Repository code may support PARTIAL but never VERIFIED for production behavior.
Zero money/ticket rows means money and door claims cannot be VERIFIED live.
n8n MCP search_workflows (limit 100) returned only 2 workflows; treated as complete live inventory.
Operator SQL used for aggregates/schema only; no PII dumps.

facts.fact: Document is Events Strategy & Ticketing Architecture for Convergeo (April 2026), companion to Strategic Master Plan.
facts.production_evidence: Source PDF extracted 23 pages; foundation audit present.
facts.gap: none
facts.recommended_action: Use as requirements baseline for events readiness

facts.fact: Platform commits to all event types (entertainment, conferences, workshops, private) from day one.
facts.production_evidence: Live CHECK allows standard|recurring|free_rsvp|private (4 values). API/UI Phase-1 category list present. 0 published events.
facts.gap: Schema covers privacy/recurring/free but not full catalogue breadth; no live events of any type
facts.impact: Strategy scope vs empty production supply
facts.recommended_action: Treat as product scope; seed Phase-1 organisers when ready (controlled)

facts.fact: In-app tickets with dynamic QR codes refreshing every 60 seconds.
facts.expected_location: tickets.qr_secret + /tickets/verify + customer ticket wallet + vendor scan
facts.production_evidence: Repo qr.py WINDOW_SECONDS=60 HMAC window codes; OpenAPI /tickets/verify + /account/tickets/{id}/horizon; vendor /en/scan exists (auth redirect). 0 ticket rows — no live verify proof.
facts.gap: Code+API present; no production tickets issued; offline cache not implemented (see F040)
facts.impact: Door fraud defence unproven in prod
facts.recommended_action: Controlled staging ticket + scanner E2E before events go-live

facts.fact: Commission model 5–10% of ticket price; floor 5% first 12 months.
facts.production_evidence: Live commission_rates: event_tickets rate_bps=500 (5%); free_events=0. Purchase hardcodes EVENT_TICKETS_RATE_BPS=500 in code. Upper 10% premium not configured as live rate.
facts.gap: Floor 5% verified in DB; 8–10% Phase-3 premium rate not present as configurable live rate
facts.recommended_action: Keep 5% for Phase 1; document when premium commission config lands

facts.fact: Add sibling Event entity with TicketType and Ticket children (not overload Product).
facts.production_evidence: Live tables present with organiser_vendor_id, event_instances, order_item_tickets. Products remain separate.
facts.gap: none
facts.recommended_action: None

facts.fact: Five event types: single-occurrence ticketed, multi-day ticketed, recurring, free RSVP, private — one Event schema with type enum.
facts.production_evidence: Live enum: standard|recurring|free_rsvp|private. No multi_day value. Multi-day duration via event_instances.ends_at (nullable).
facts.gap: Document multi_day type vs live standard+ends_at; naming single→standard
facts.impact: Organiser UX and reporting may blur multi-day festivals vs single nights
facts.recommended_action: Decide: add multi_day enum OR document ends_at spanning as accepted model; update strategy/decisions

facts.fact: Free RSVP/capacity-tracked events: free QR ticket, same entry control, no escrow path.
facts.production_evidence: Schema+CHECK free_rsvp price=0; OpenAPI POST /tickets/rsvp; commission free_events=0; type_policy is_free_only. 0 operational rows.
facts.gap: Path exists in API/schema; no live free events/tickets
facts.impact: Phase-1 calendar population blocked by supply not schema
facts.recommended_action: Organiser outreach + publish first free RSVP events

facts.fact: Private/invitation-only: listed-but-unsearchable; access via signed URL or 6-digit code.
facts.production_evidence: Live visibility public|unlisted|private + access_code_hash column; search_upsert gates non-public. No live private events to prove code gate end-to-end.
facts.gap: Schema present; E2E access-code purchase unproven in prod; Phase 3 per doc
facts.recommended_action: E2E test access-code path in staging before Phase 3 launch

facts.fact: EventInstance child: date, start_time, end_time, capacity.
facts.production_evidence: Live columns starts_at, ends_at, capacity; CHECK ends_at>starts_at; count=0.
facts.gap: No instance rows yet
facts.recommended_action: Create events via organiser flow when supply ready

facts.fact: TicketType: name, price, perks, inventory_per_instance; Ticket: holder_name, dynamic_qr_secret, status.
facts.production_evidence: Live: ticket_types name/price_ngwee/qty_cap/attendee_named/early_bird; tickets holder_name/qr_secret/pin_hash/status. No dedicated perks column. Allocations via ticket_type_instances.
facts.gap: perks field not a first-class column; inventory via qty_cap + ticket_type_instances
facts.impact: Organiser perk copy may live in name/description only
facts.recommended_action: Confirm product acceptance of name/description for perks vs new column

facts.fact: Fixed-price tier pricing mode (default).
facts.production_evidence: CHECK kind in fixed|tier|free_rsvp; purchase resolves base price_ngwee.
facts.gap: No live ticket_types rows
facts.impact: Ready for use when events published
facts.recommended_action: None for schema

facts.fact: Multi-tier named TicketType rows under one Event (VIP/Regular/Student).
facts.production_evidence: Schema allows multiple ticket_types per event; kind=tier allowed. OpenAPI organiser ticket-types CRUD. 0 rows.
facts.gap: Supported by schema/API; unproven with live multi-tier event
facts.recommended_action: Publish test multi-tier event in non-prod or controlled beta

facts.fact: Early-bird / time-staged pricing via price_schedule on TicketType.
facts.production_evidence: Live columns + pair CHECK; OpenAPI /organiser/ticket-types/{id}/early-bird; purchase lowest-price resolution. Not full generic price_schedule JSON.
facts.gap: Single early-bird window only (not multi-stage schedule)
facts.impact: Simple early-bird OK; complex schedules unsupported
facts.recommended_action: Accept single window for Phase 1; backlog multi-stage if needed

facts.fact: Group/table sold as bundle of N seats generating N tickets.
facts.production_evidence: Live ticket_type_price_tiers (min_qty>=2, price_ngwee); purchase loads tiers. Does not auto-generate N named seats as a table SKU primitive — qty-based discount.
facts.gap: Group price tiers exist; table-of-N seat packaging UX/primitive incomplete vs brief
facts.recommended_action: Clarify accept qty-discount vs true table SKU; UI if needed

facts.fact: Free RSVP zero-price capacity tracked (Type-4).
facts.production_evidence: CHECK enforces price_ngwee=0 for free_rsvp; /tickets/rsvp endpoint.
facts.gap: No live rows
facts.recommended_action: None

facts.fact: Pay-what-you-want min/max (Phase 3).
facts.production_evidence: kind CHECK has no pwyw; no min/max columns found in live ticket_types.
facts.gap: Unsupported product feature (explicitly Phase 3 in source)
facts.recommended_action: Backlog Phase 3; do not treat as launch blocker

facts.fact: Capacity tree: venue ceiling + per-tier + per-day + held comps; validate tier sums ≤ venue capacity.
facts.production_evidence: instance capacity + ticket_type qty_cap/allocations exist; inventory.py oversell guard. No venue-level hard ceiling column or tier-sum≤venue write-time rule found in live schema.
facts.gap: Per-tier/instance capacity yes; venue ceiling + held-comps pools missing
facts.impact: Oversell risk class reduced but venue safety check incomplete
facts.recommended_action: Add venue_capacity + validation rule before stadium-scale Phase 2

facts.fact: Display fees inclusive by default with checkout breakdown (ticket + platform fee).
facts.production_evidence: Commission rates exist; live fee-breakdown UX for ticket checkout NOT verified (0 payments; auth-gated checkout).
facts.gap: Requires authenticated ticket checkout session / screenshot
facts.impact: Cart abandonment risk if hidden fees
facts.recommended_action: Manual QA of ticket checkout fee line items with test event

facts.fact: Organisers choose absorb-fee or pass-through fee incidence.
facts.production_evidence: No fee_mode/absorb/pass_through column on live events/ticket_types (information_schema probe via kind/columns inventory).
facts.gap: Configuration field absent
facts.recommended_action: Add fee incidence flag + checkout calc when commercial priority

facts.fact: Events under 14 days away: hold full settlement until 24h after event ends.
facts.production_evidence: Repo event_release.py implements rule; OpenAPI internal tick exists (405 GET). Live n8n has NO active event-release workflow (only dispatch + payment reconciliation). 0 ledger/payments.
facts.gap: Code path present; production automation inactive; no live paid event proof
facts.impact: P0 if ticketed events go live without release cron
facts.recommended_action: Activate/deploy event-release n8n job before first paid ticket sale; prove with test payment

facts.fact: Events 14+ days away: release 50% at T-7 days, remaining 50% at T+1 after event.
facts.production_evidence: Code implements 50% at starts_at-7d and 50% at end+1d. Recurring forced full_only. Unproven live.
facts.gap: Same as F020 — no live money + inactive n8n
facts.recommended_action: Same as F020 + unit/integration tests already in repo; run staging money drill

facts.fact: Events tab lenses: When (Tonight, This Weekend, Next Week, Next Month, On a Date).
facts.production_evidence: Live UI/API: tonight + this_weekend + all + calendar dates; page title Events | Vergeo5. Next Week/Next Month chips not present as named windows.
facts.gap: Subset of When lenses shipped
facts.recommended_action: Add next_week/next_month if product wants full lens set

facts.fact: What categories: Music, Comedy, Workshops, Conferences, Sports, Family, Religious, Markets, Exhibitions.
facts.production_evidence: Live 6 Phase-1 slugs: workshops, comedy-theatre, pop-up-dinners, cultural-arts, lifestyle-community, free-rsvp. Not the full What list.
facts.gap: Phase-1 taxonomy only (aligns §9); full 11 top-level missing
facts.recommended_action: Expand categories with Phase 2/3 supply

facts.fact: Where by city (Lusaka, Ndola, Kitwe, Livingstone, Kabwe), neighbourhood, near-me radius.
facts.production_evidence: events.lat/lng/venue/landmark columns exist. Public /events response shows categories+calendar_dates, no city lens in probed payload. Near-me ranking not verified live.
facts.gap: Where lens UI/API not evidenced on public browse
facts.recommended_action: Ship city/near-me filters when geo ranking prioritized

facts.fact: Hybrid Meilisearch + pgvector with time decay, sell-through, distance, category/follow, verification boosts.
facts.production_evidence: Platform locked to Postgres FTS+pg_trgm+pgvector (not Meilisearch). search_documents exists (288 rows mostly catalogue). Events count 0 so event ranking unproven. No selling-fast badge in UI HTML probe.
facts.gap: Meilisearch named in brief vs Postgres search in production architecture; sell-through badge absent
facts.impact: Strategy text outdated vs D18–D24 stack
facts.recommended_action: Update strategy language to Postgres hybrid; backlog selling-fast signal

facts.fact: Homepage events module defaults to Tonight + This Weekend.
facts.production_evidence: /en/events supports tonight/this_weekend. Homepage HTML probe: events mentions present; tonight/this weekend strings absent on home (0 counts).
facts.gap: Browse page has defaults; homepage module default not evidenced as Tonight+Weekend
facts.recommended_action: Wire home events row to tonight/weekend query

facts.fact: Month grid calendar view after 50+ active events (Phase 2).
facts.production_evidence: Events page has calendar date chips/month days component; /en/calendar 404. Not full Phase-2 month density grid product.
facts.gap: Lightweight calendar chips vs full calendar product
facts.recommended_action: Defer until ≥50 events; enhance calendar UX then

facts.fact: Events plug into city guides (Lusaka, Livingstone, Ndola) as first-class section.
facts.production_evidence: Not probed as existing production city-guide surface in this session; no public events to embed.
facts.gap: Need confirmed city-guide routes/content inventory
facts.recommended_action: Audit city-guide docs/routes in follow-up

facts.fact: Server-side secret; client HMAC time-window QR every 60s; verify valid/used/invalid/expired.
facts.production_evidence: qr.py HMAC-SHA256 truncated window codes; verify endpoint 401 without auth (exists). 0 tickets — outcomes unproven live.
facts.gap: Implementation evidenced in repo+OpenAPI; production E2E missing
facts.recommended_action: Staging door drill with issued ticket

facts.fact: Scanner works offline for short periods by caching day's secrets and syncing used status.
facts.production_evidence: Vendor scan UI shows offline notice and 'Cannot verify offline' error path in tests/components — online-required verify, not secret-cache offline verify.
facts.gap: Offline verification not implemented (notice-only)
facts.impact: Copperbelt door reliability risk — P1 for stadium/remote venues
facts.recommended_action: Implement horizon cache + deferred scan-sync (API scan-sync exists)

facts.fact: 6-digit PIN unique per ticket displayed alongside QR; same verify logic.
facts.production_evidence: pin_hash column + generate_pin/verify_pin in qr.py; sealed storage. No live tickets.
facts.gap: Unproven live display/verify
facts.recommended_action: Include PIN in staging door drill

facts.fact: Each ticket carries holder_name captured at purchase (group: each holder).
facts.production_evidence: Columns holder_name + ticket_types.attendee_named; customer attendee-names helpers in app. 0 tickets.
facts.gap: No live named tickets
facts.recommended_action: Exercise named-attendee purchase in staging

facts.fact: Transferable up to 6h before start; disabled inside 6h; issues new ticket via SMS/WhatsApp; resale blocked.
facts.production_evidence: ticket_transfer.py TRANSFER_CUTOFF 6h; OpenAPI transfer/claim/cancel; table ticket_transfers count=0. Resale marketplace absent (aligned). Notification channel for transfer claim NOT_AUDITABLE without sending.
facts.gap: Cutoff+API present; live transfer+WA delivery unproven
facts.recommended_action: Staging transfer + outbox delivery check

facts.fact: Vendor app event scanner mode: green check + holder + tier; live attendance counter; organiser manual override audit-logged.
facts.production_evidence: vendor.vergeo5.com/en/scan → 307 login; OpenAPI organiser stats + scan-sync. Manual override/attendance counter UX not verified authenticated.
facts.gap: Auth-gated; no live event to scan
facts.recommended_action: Authenticated vendor scan QA on test event

facts.fact: Buyer/organiser cancel/reschedule/force-majeure refund matrix (full/50%/none + notifications).
facts.production_evidence: refund_policy_key column exists; cancellation module in repo; refunds table 0 rows; disputes 0. Full customer-facing matrix not verified live.
facts.gap: Policy field + some cancellation code; matrix UX/auto-refund unproven; 0 refunds
facts.recommended_action: Document implemented vs deferred matrix cells; test organiser cancel auto-refund path

facts.fact: Tier 1 personal organiser: NRC KYC; free RSVP immediate; ticketed GMV cap e.g. K20,000 until 3 successful events.
facts.production_evidence: kyc_records count=0; no live GMV cap column/config found for organisers in probed schema; KYC tier model may exist elsewhere for vendors generally.
facts.gap: Event-specific Tier-1 GMV cap not evidenced in live config
facts.impact: Organiser fraud exposure if uncapped — P0 before paid ticket sales
facts.recommended_action: Implement/verify organiser GMV caps tied to KYC tier before enabling paid events

facts.fact: Tier 2 business organiser: PACRA verified; full ticketed; verified badge.
facts.expected_location: KYC + verified badge on event cards
facts.production_evidence: Prior remediation notes badge shipped in code (#201). Live: 0 events so badge unobservable; kyc_records=0.
facts.gap: Code claim vs no live KYC/events
facts.recommended_action: Complete KYC for first organisers; verify badge on published card

facts.fact: 3-screen event creation under 5 minutes with draft/publish.
facts.production_evidence: Vendor events/new page exists in repo; unauth → 307. Draft/published statuses in events.status CHECK. Live events=0.
facts.gap: Auth-gated UI not exercised
facts.recommended_action: Vendor login E2E create draft→publish

facts.fact: Roles Owner/Manager/Door by phone invite, event-scoped.
facts.production_evidence: to_regclass event_organiser_roles = false. Only vendor owner pattern via organiser_vendor_id.
facts.gap: No co-organiser RBAC tables
facts.impact: Door staff must share owner login — security/ops risk P1
facts.recommended_action: Design event-scoped roles before multi-staff venues

facts.fact: Shareable OG link, promo codes, affiliate links, email/SMS to past attendees.
facts.production_evidence: promo_codes/event_affiliates tables absent. Event detail route /en/e/[slug] exists (demo 404). OG not verified without published event.
facts.gap: Promo/affiliate/attendee messaging unsupported
facts.recommended_action: Backlog; OG check when first event publishes

facts.fact: Dashboard: sold vs capacity by tier, velocity, attribution, predicted attendance.
facts.production_evidence: OpenAPI stats endpoint exists (401 unauth). Depth of four metrics NOT_AUDITABLE without auth+data.
facts.gap: Need organiser JWT + event with sales
facts.recommended_action: Auth probe of stats payload shape

facts.fact: First valid scan marks ticket used; subsequent scans red with original timestamp.
facts.production_evidence: tickets.status includes checked_in; checked_in_at column. Verify requires auth — not exercised. 0 tickets.
facts.gap: Live door proof missing
facts.recommended_action: Door drill

facts.fact: Optional ID match for high-value tickets (>K500), organiser-toggleable, default off.
facts.production_evidence: No id_match/high_value_toggle column found in live events/ticket_types inventory.
facts.gap: Feature unsupported
facts.recommended_action: Backlog for Phase 2 music

facts.fact: Staff call organiser 48h before for events selling >K100,000.
facts.production_evidence: n8n live workflows: only notification dispatch + payment reconciliation. No pre-event verification workflow.
facts.gap: Ops process/automation absent
facts.recommended_action: Manual ops runbook + later n8n alert

facts.fact: Disputes up to 7 days after end; evidence mandatory; 72h auto-buyer; 3+ upheld loses privileges.
facts.production_evidence: disputes table exists, 0 rows. Event-specific 7d/72h/privilege rules not verified in live config.
facts.gap: Generic disputes scaffolding; event rules unproven
facts.recommended_action: Confirm dispute policy code vs brief; test with fixture

facts.fact: ~65 event sub-categories across 11 top-level categories must be absorbable by data model.
facts.production_evidence: Live event_categories=6 Phase-1 parents (parent_slug ready). Schema can grow; 65 not seeded.
facts.gap: Taxonomy not fully seeded (by design Phase 1)
facts.recommended_action: Seed parents/children with supply waves

facts.fact: Phase 1 launch categories: workshops, comedy/theatre, pop-up dinners, cultural & arts, lifestyle community, free RSVP broadly.
facts.production_evidence: API /events categories exactly these 6 slugs; DB matches. Published events total=0.
facts.gap: Taxonomy ready; supply missing
facts.recommended_action: Controlled organiser onboarding for Phase-1 supply

facts.fact: No platform commission on free events ever, by design.
facts.production_evidence: Live free_events rate_bps=0 VERIFIED.
facts.gap: none
facts.recommended_action: None

facts.fact: Phase 2: music, conferences, sports, fashion/wedding expos, multi-day. Phase 3: international, religious scale, private, cultural festivals, tourism-adjacent.
facts.production_evidence: Absent from live supply by design; many supporting features MISSING (see matrix).
facts.gap: Correctly not launched; dependencies incomplete
facts.recommended_action: Keep gated; do not mark as prod defect

facts.fact: Event ticketing operational path ready in production (events, tickets, payments, escrow automation).
facts.production_evidence: events=0 tickets=0 payments=0 ledger_txns=0. n8n active: 2 workflows (dispatch, payment recon). Repo has event-release.json, tickets-issue.json, tickets-release.json but not active in live n8n search.
facts.gap: No operational event commerce; release/issue crons not active
facts.recommended_action: Do not sell paid tickets until issue+release automation active and money drill passes

facts.fact: ticket_type_instances and ticket_type_price_tiers have RLS enabled but FORCE RLS false.
facts.production_evidence: Live query: ticket_type_instances and ticket_type_price_tiers rls_forced=false (policy_count=6 each). Matches foundation PARTIAL risk.
facts.gap: Inconsistent FORCE RLS vs other ticket tables
facts.recommended_action: Confirm intentional; enable FORCE RLS if table owners can be bypassed via privileges

facts.fact: Reuse existing Cart, Order, Payment, Escrow flows with minimal change.
facts.production_evidence: OpenAPI /tickets/checkout + order_item_tickets table + event_release module. 0 checkout money rows for tickets.
facts.gap: Integration coded; unproven live
facts.recommended_action: End-to-end paid ticket test in staging/prod-safe drill

facts.fact: Customer can browse events at /en/events.
facts.production_evidence: HTTP 200; title Events | Vergeo5; empty state signals (no events / empty); tonight/weekend filter copy present.
facts.gap: Empty catalogue
facts.recommended_action: Populate Phase-1 events

facts.fact: Public events list API available.
facts.production_evidence: https://api.vergeo5.com/events → 200 {items:[], total:0, categories:[6 Phase-1], calendar_dates:[]}.
facts.gap: Empty items
facts.recommended_action: None

facts.fact: Customer ticket wallet surfaces dynamic QR for held tickets.
facts.production_evidence: Route redirects 307 (auth); API GET /account/tickets → 401. Implementation present, not user-verified.
facts.gap: Need customer auth session
facts.recommended_action: Auth session QA

facts.fact: Public launch / feature flags do not specially enable events.
facts.production_evidence: All 5 flags false including public_launch. No events-specific flag.
facts.gap: Invite gate still on platform-wide
facts.recommended_action: Keep events behind controlled invites until money path proven
